content.requirement: Informative images on auth and marketing routes must have alt text
compareSteps: Scan JSX/TSX on /signup, /login, / landing for img elements
Flag missing alt or empty alt on non-decorative images
Allow alt="" only when image is decorative (role=presentation or aria-hidden)
content.remediationDirective: Add descriptive alt text to informative images; mark decorative images with alt="" and aria-hidden.
